<span class="cline-any cline-neutral">&nbsp;</span></td><td class="text"><pre class="prettyprint lang-js">import type { QueryResult } from "mysql2";
import type { Body_part } from "../../models/body_part";
import type { Category } from "../../models/category";
import type { Pack } from "../../models/pack";
import type { Product } from "../../models/product";
import type { Skin } from "../../models/skin";
import MySQLService from "../service/mysql_service";
import Body_partRepository from "./body_part_repository";
import CategoryRepository from "./category_repository";
import PackRepository from "./pack_repository";
import SkinRepository from "./skin_repository";
&nbsp;
class ProductRepository {
	// Nom de la table SQL
	private table = "product";
&nbsp;
	// Selectionner tous les enregistrements
	public selectAll = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (): Promise&lt;Product[] | unknown&gt; =&gt; {</span></span>
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.product;
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`SELECT ${this.table}.*,</span>
					GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT skin.id) AS skin_ids,
					GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pack.id) AS pack_ids,
					GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT body_part.id) AS body_part_ids
                    FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
&nbsp;
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin 
					ON product_skin.product_id = product.id 
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.skin
					ON product_skin.skin_id = skin.id
&nbsp;
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_pack 
					ON product_pack.product_id = product.id 
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.pack
					ON product_pack.pack_id = pack.id
&nbsp;
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_body_part
					ON product_body_part.product_id = product.id 
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.body_part
					ON product_body_part.body_part_id = body_part.id
&nbsp;
					GROUP BY ${this.table}.id;
					`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Execution de la requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql);</span>
&nbsp;
			// Boucler sur les resultats pour recuperer les objets en relation (composition en Programmation Orientée Objet)
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			for (let i = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >0; i</span> &lt; (query as Product[]).length; i++) {</span>
				// Récuperer le resultat
				const result = (<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >query as Product[])[i] as Product;</span>
&nbsp;
				// Cles etrangère
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >				result.category = (await new CategoryRepository().selectOne({</span>
					id: result.category_id,
				})) as Category;
&nbsp;
				// tables de jointure
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >				result.skins = (await new SkinRepository().selectInList(</span>
					result.skin_ids as string,
				)) as Skin[];
			}
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return query;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	// Séléctionner un enregistrement
	// data représente une partie des propriété du type
	public selectOne = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (</span></span>
		data: Partial&lt;Product&gt;,
	): Promise&lt;Product | unknown&gt; =&gt; {
		// connexion au server MySQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
		// requete SQL
		// where category.id=....
		// SELECT level.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev;
		// variable de requete : précédée d'un :, suivi du nom de la variable
		// requetes préparées :sécurité;(utilisation des varibales de requetes)la requete est exécutée si elle ne représente pas de risque de sécurité
		// DISTINCT: Evite les doublons
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`SELECT ${this.table}.*,                                      </span>
					GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT skin.id) AS skin_ids,
					GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pack.id) AS pack_ids,
					GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT body_part.id) AS body_part_ids
                    FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
&nbsp;
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin 
					ON product_skin.product_id = product.id 
					LEFT JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.skin
					ON product_skin.skin_id = skin.id
&nbsp;
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_pack 
					ON product_pack.product_id = product.id 
					LEFT JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.pack
					ON product_pack.pack_id = pack.id
&nbsp;
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_body_part
					ON product_body_part.product_id = product.id 
					JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.body_part
					ON product_body_part.body_part_id = body_part.id
					
					WHERE ${this.table}.id = :id
					GROUP BY ${this.table}.id;
					`;
		// try / catch pour récuperer les resultats de la requete ou une erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// execution de la requete
			// si la requete possede des variables, utiliser le parametre de la méthode
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
			// récuperer le premier indice d'un array
			const result = (<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >query as Product[]).shift() as Product;</span>
&nbsp;
			// Cles etrangère
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			result.category = (await new CategoryRepository().selectOne({</span>
				id: result.category_id,
			})) as Category;
&nbsp;
			// tables de jointure
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			result.skins = (await new SkinRepository().selectInList(</span>
				result.skin_ids as string,
			)) as Skin[];
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			result.packs = (await new PackRepository().selectInList(</span>
				result.pack_ids as string,
			)) as Pack[];
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			result.body_parts = (await new Body_partRepository().selectInList(</span>
				result.body_part_ids as string,
			)) as Body_part[];
&nbsp;
			// retourner les résultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return result;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	// Selectionner plusieurs éléments dans une liste
	public selectInList = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (l</span>ist: string): Promise&lt;Product[] | unknown&gt; =&gt; {</span>
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.product;
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`SELECT ${this.table}.*</span>
                    FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
					WHERE ${this.table}.id IN (${list})
					;
				`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Execution de la requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql);</span>
&nbsp;
			// Boucler sur les resultats pour recuperer les objets en relation (composition en Programmation Orientée Objet)
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			for (let i = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >0; i</span> &lt; (query as Product[]).length; i++) {</span>
				// Récuperer le resultat
				const result = (<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >query as Product[])[i] as Product;</span>
&nbsp;
				// Cles etrangère
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >				result.category = (await new CategoryRepository().selectOne({</span>
					id: result.category_id,
				})) as Category;
			}
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return query;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	// Insérer un enregistrement
	public insert = async (
		data: Partial&lt;Product&gt;,
	): Promise&lt;QueryResult | unknown&gt; =&gt; {
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = await new MySQLService().connect();
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.product;
		let sql = `
			INSERT INTO ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}		
            VALUE (
				NULL,
				:name,
				:image,
				:description,
				:price,
				:category_id
			);
		`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
		try {
			// Demarrer une transaction
			connection.beginTransaction();
&nbsp;
			// Execution de la première requete
			await connection.execute(sql, data);
&nbsp;
			// Seconde Requete
			sql = `SET @id = LAST_INSERT_ID();`;
			await connection.execute(sql, data);
&nbsp;
			// Troisième requete
			/* 
			1,2,3
				&gt;&gt;&gt;
			INSERT INTO secretsDeHammam_dev.product_pack
			VALUES 
			(1, @id),
			(2, @id),
			(3, @id)
			;
&nbsp;
			split: extraire les données d'une chaine de caractères en array
			1,2,3 &gt;&gt;&gt;&gt; [1,2,3]
			map 
				[1,2,3] &gt;&gt; [(1, @id), (2, @id), (3, @id)]
				join 
				[(1, @id), (2, @id), (3, @id)] &gt;&gt; (1, @id), (2, @id), (3, @id)
			 */
&nbsp;
			let joinIds = (data.skin_ids as string)
				?.split(`,`)
				.map((value) =&gt; `(@id, ${value})`)
				.join();
&nbsp;
			sql = `
				INSERT INTO
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin
				VALUES
					${joinIds}
				;
			`;
&nbsp;
			await connection.execute(sql, data);
&nbsp;
			joinIds = (data.pack_ids as string)
				?.split(`,`)
				.map((value) =&gt; `(@id, ${value})`)
				.join();
&nbsp;
			sql = `
				INSERT INTO
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_pack
				VALUES
					${joinIds}
				;
			`;
&nbsp;
			await connection.execute(sql, data);
&nbsp;
			joinIds = (data.body_part_ids as string)
				?.split(`,`)
				.map((value) =&gt; `(@id, ${value})`)
				.join();
&nbsp;
			sql = `
				INSERT INTO
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_body_part
				VALUES
					${joinIds}
				;
			`;
&nbsp;
			// query doit etre placer sur la dernière requete
			const [query] = await connection.execute(sql);
&nbsp;
			// Valider transaction SQL
			connection.commit();
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
			return query;
		} catch (error) {
			// Annuler une transaction
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			connection.rollback();</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	public update = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (</span></span>
		data: Partial&lt;Product&gt;,
	): Promise&lt;QueryResult | unknown&gt; =&gt; {
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.product;
		let sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`</span>
			Update
				${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
 			set
				${this.table}.name = :name,
				${this.table}.image = :image,
				${this.table}.description = :description,
				${this.table}.price = :price,
				${this.table}.category_id = :category_id
 			where
				${this.table}.id = :id;
		`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Demarrer une transaction
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			connection.beginTransaction();</span>
&nbsp;
			// Execution de la première requete
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			sql = `</span>
				DELETE FROM
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin
				WHERE
					product_skin.product_id = :id;
				`;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			sql = `</span>

					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_pack
				WHERE
					product_pack.product_id = :id;
				`;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;

					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_body_part
				WHERE
					product_body_part.product_id = :id;
				`;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
			let joinIds = (<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >data.skin_ids as string)</span>
				?.split(`,`)
				.map(<span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >(v</span>alue) =&gt; <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`(:id, ${value})`)</span>
				.join();
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			sql = `</span>
				INSERT INTO
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin
				VALUES
					${joinIds}
				;
			`;
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			joinIds = (data.pack_ids as string)</span>
				?.split(`,`)
				.map(<span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >(v</span>alue) =&gt; <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`(:id, ${value})`)</span>
				.join();
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			sql = `</span>
				INSERT INTO
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_pack
				VALUES
					${joinIds}
				;
			`;
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			joinIds = (data.body_part_ids as string)</span>
				?.split(`,`)
				.map(<span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >(v</span>alue) =&gt; <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`(:id, ${value})`)</span>
				.join();
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			sql = `</span>
				INSERT INTO
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_body_part
				VALUES
					${joinIds}
				;
			`;
&nbsp;
			// // Seconde Requete

			// 	DELETE FROM

			// 	WHERE
			// 		${this.table}.id = :id;

&nbsp;

			// await connection.execute(sql);
&nbsp;
			// Troisième requete
			/* 
			1,2,3
				&gt;&gt;&gt;
			INSERT INTO secretsDeHammam_dev.product_pack
			VALUES 
			(1, @id),
			(2, @id),
			(3, @id)
			;
&nbsp;
			split: extraire les données d'une chaine de caractères en array
			1,2,3 &gt;&gt;&gt;&gt; [1,2,3]
			map 
				[1,2,3] &gt;&gt; [(1, @id), (2, @id), (3, @id)]
				join 
				[(1, @id), (2, @id), (3, @id)] &gt;&gt; (1, @id), (2, @id), (3, @id)
			 */
&nbsp;

			// 	?.split(`,`)
			// 	.map((value) =&gt; `(@id, ${value})`)
			// 	.join();
&nbsp;
			// sql = `
			// 	INSERT INTO
			// 		${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin
			// 	VALUES
			// 		${joinIds}
			// 	;
			// `;
&nbsp;
			// query doit etre placer sur la dernière requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
			// Valider transaction SQL
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			connection.commit();</span>
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return query;</span>
		} catch (error) {
			// Annuler une transaction
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			connection.rollback();</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	public delete = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (</span></span>
		data: Partial&lt;Product&gt;,
	): Promise&lt;QueryResult | unknown&gt; =&gt; {
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.product;
		let sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`</span>
			DELETE FROM
				${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin
 			WHERE
				product_skin.product_id = :id;
		`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Demarrer une transaction
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			connection.beginTransaction();</span>
&nbsp;
			// Execution de la première requete
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			sql = `</span>
				DELETE FROM
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_pack
				WHERE
					product_pack.product_id = :id;
				`;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			sql = `</span>
				DELETE FROM
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_body_part
				WHERE
					product_body_part.product_id = :id;
				`;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
			// // Seconde Requete
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			sql = `</span>
				DELETE FROM
					${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
				WHERE
					${this.table}.id = :id;
			`;
&nbsp;
			// query doit etre placer sur la dernière requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
			// Valider transaction SQL
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			connection.commit();</span>
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return query;</span>
		} catch (error) {
			// Annuler une transaction
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			connection.rollback();</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};

}
&nbsp;
export default ProductRepository;

<span class="cline-any cline-neutral">&nbsp;</span></td><td class="text"><pre class="prettyprint lang-js">import type { QueryResult } from "mysql2";
import type { Role } from "../../models/role";
import type { Skin } from "../../models/skin";
import type { User } from "../../models/user";
import MySQLService from "../service/mysql_service";
import RoleRepository from "./role_repository";
import SkinRepository from "./skin_repository";
&nbsp;
class SecurityRepository {
	// Nom de la table SQL
	private table = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >"user";</span>
&nbsp;
	// Enregistrer un utilisateur
	public register = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (</span></span>
		data: Partial&lt;User&gt;,
	): Promise&lt;QueryResult | unknown&gt; =&gt; {
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
		// console.log(data);
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.pack;
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`</span>
			INSERT INTO ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}		
			VALUE(
				NULL,
				:email,
				:password,
				2,
				NULL
			);
		`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Execution de la requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return query;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	public isEmailUserExists = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (</span></span>
		data: Partial&lt;User&gt;,
	): Promise&lt;boolean | unknown&gt; =&gt; {
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.pack;
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`</span>
			SELECT ${this.table}.*
        FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
        WHERE ${this.table}.email=:email;
		`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Execution de la requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
			// si l'email existe
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			if ((query as []).length &gt; 0) <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >return true;</span></span>
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return false;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	// Récuperer un utilisateur par son email
&nbsp;
	public selectOneByEMail = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (</span></span>
		data: Partial&lt;User&gt;,
	): Promise&lt;User | unknown&gt; =&gt; {
		// connexion au server MySQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
		// requete SQL
		// where category.id=....
		// SELECT level.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev;
		// variable de requete : précédée d'un :, suivi du nom de la variable
		// requetes préparées :sécurité;(utilisation des varibales de requetes)la requete est exécutée si elle ne représente pas de risque de sécurité
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`</span>
		SELECT ${this.table}.*
		FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
		WHERE ${this.table}.email = :email;
		`;
		// try / catch pour récuperer les resultats de la requete ou une erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// execution de la requete
			// si la requete possede des variables, utiliser le parametre de la méthode
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
			// récuperer le premier indice d'un array
			const result = (<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >query as User[]).shift() as User;</span>
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			result.role = (await new RoleRepository().selectOne({</span>
				id: result.role_id,
			})) as Role;
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			result.skin = (await new SkinRepository().selectOne({</span>
				id: result.skin_id,
			})) as Skin;
			// retourner les résultats
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return result;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default SecurityRepository;
&nbsp;</pre></td></tr></table></pre>

<span class="cline-any cline-neutral">&nbsp;</span></td><td class="text"><pre class="prettyprint lang-js">import type { Product } from "../../models/product";
import type { Skin } from "../../models/skin";
import MySQLService from "../service/mysql_service";
import ProductRepository from "./product_repository";
&nbsp;
class SkinRepository {
	// Nom de la table SQL
	private table = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >"skin";</span>
&nbsp;
	// Selectionner tous les enregistrements
	public selectAll = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (): Promise&lt;Skin[] | unknown&gt; =&gt; {</span></span>
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
&nbsp;
		/* requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.skin;
		const sql = `SELECT ${this.table}.*
                    FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table};`;
		*/
&nbsp;
		// requete SQL
		/*
			SELECT
				skin.*,
					GROUP_CONCAT(product_id) AS product_ids
				FROM 
					secretsDeHammam_dev.skin
				JOIN
					secretsDeHammam_dev.product_skin
				ON
					product_skin.skin_id = skin.id
				JOIN
					secretsDeHammam_dev.product
				ON
					product.id = product_skin.product_id
				GROUP BY
					skin.id ` 
				*/
&nbsp;
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >` </span>
		SELECT ${this.table}.*, 
	GROUP_CONCAT(product_id) AS product_ids 
	FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
	JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin 
	ON product_skin.skin_id = ${this.table}.id 
	JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product 
	ON product.id = product_skin.product_id 
	GROUP BY ${this.table}.id ;
			;
			`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Execution de la requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql);</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			for (let i = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >0; i</span> &lt; (query as Skin[]).length; i++) {</span>
				// Récuperer le resultat
				const result = (<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >query as Skin[])[i] as Skin;</span>
&nbsp;
				// tables de jointure
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >				result.products = (await new ProductRepository().selectInList(</span>
					result.product_ids,
				)) as Product[];
			}
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return query;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	// Séléctionner un enregistrement
	// data représente une partie des propriété du type
	public selectOne = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (d</span>ata: Partial&lt;Skin&gt;): Promise&lt;Skin | unknown&gt; =&gt; {</span>
		// connexion au server MySQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
		// requete SQL
		// where category.id=....
		// SELECT level.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev;
		// variable de requete : précédée d'un :, suivi du nom de la variable
		// requetes préparées :sécurité;(utilisation des varibales de requetes)la requete est exécutée si elle ne représente pas de risque de sécurité
		// const sql = `
		// SELECT ${this.table}.*
		// FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
		// WHERE ${this.table}.id = :id;
		// `;
&nbsp;
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >` </span>
		SELECT ${this.table}.*, 
	GROUP_CONCAT(product_id) AS product_ids 
	FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
	JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product_skin 
	ON product_skin.skin_id = ${this.table}.id 
	JOIN ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.product 
	ON product.id = product_skin.product_id 
	WHERE ${this.table}.id = :id
	GROUP BY ${this.table}.id ;
			;
			`;
&nbsp;
		// try / catch pour récuperer les resultats de la requete ou une erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// execution de la requete
			// si la requete possede des variables, utiliser le parametre de la méthode
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
			// récuperer le premier indice d'un array
			const result = (<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >query as Skin[]).shift() as Skin;</span>
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			result.products = (await new ProductRepository().selectInList(</span>
				result.product_ids,
			)) as Product[];
			// retourner les résultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return result;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	public selectInList = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (l</span>ist: string): Promise&lt;Skin[] | unknown&gt; =&gt; {</span>
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.product;
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`SELECT ${this.table}.*</span>
                    FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
					WHERE ${this.table}.id IN (${list})
					;
				`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Execution de la requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql);</span>
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return query;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default SkinRepository;
&nbsp;</pre></td></tr></table></pre>

import type { User } from "../../models/user";
import MySQLService from "../service/mysql_service";
import RoleRepository from "./role_repository";
&nbsp;
class UserRepository {
	// Nom de la table SQL
	private table = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >"user";</span>
&nbsp;
	// Selectionner tous les enregistrements
	public selectAll = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (): Promise&lt;User[] | unknown&gt; =&gt; {</span></span>
		// connexionau server SQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
&nbsp;
		// requête SQL : SELECT role.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev.pack;
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`SELECT ${this.table}.*</span>
                    FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table};`;
&nbsp;
		// Try / Catch : récuperer les résultats de la reqête ou un erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// Execution de la requete
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql);</span>
&nbsp;
			// Retourner reultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return query;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
&nbsp;
	// Séléctionner un enregistrement
	// data représente une partie des propriété du type
	public selectOne = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" ><span class="fstat-no" title="function not covered" >async (d</span>ata: Partial&lt;User&gt;): Promise&lt;User | unknown&gt; =&gt; {</span>
		// connexion au server MySQL
		const connection = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await new MySQLService().connect();</span>
		// requete SQL
		// where category.id=....
		// SELECT level.* FROM secretsDeHammam_dev;
		// variable de requete : précédée d'un :, suivi du nom de la variable
		// requetes préparées :sécurité;(utilisation des varibales de requetes)la requete est exécutée si elle ne représente pas de risque de sécurité
		const sql = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >`</span>
		SELECT ${this.table}.*
		FROM ${process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE}.${this.table}
		WHERE ${this.table}.id = :id;
		`;
		// try / catch pour récuperer les resultats de la requete ou une erreur
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >		try {</span>
			// execution de la requete
			// si la requete possede des variables, utiliser le parametre de la méthode
			const [query] = <span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >await connection.execute(sql, data);</span>
			// récuperer le premier indice d'un array
			const result = (<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >query as User[]).shift() as User;</span>
&nbsp;
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			result.role = (await new RoleRepository().selectOne({</span>
				id: result.role_id,
			})) as Role;
&nbsp;
			// retourner les résultats
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return result;</span>
		} catch (error) {
<span class="cstat-no" title="statement not covered" >			return error;</span>
		}
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default UserRepository;

import Body_PartController from "../controller/body_part_controller";
&nbsp;
class Body_partRouter {
	// router express
	private router = express.Router();
&nbsp;
	// liste des routes
	public getRoutes = () =&gt; {
		// Créer une route en GET simple
		this.router.get("/", new Body_PartController().index);
&nbsp;
		// variable de route: précédé par :; suivi du nom de la variable
		// appel 1
		this.router.get("/:id", new Body_PartController().selectOne);
&nbsp;
		// retourner le routeur
		return this.router;
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default Body_partRouter;
&nbsp;</pre></td></tr></table></pre>

import ContactController from "../controller/contact_controller";
&nbsp;
class ContactRouter {
	// router express
	private router = express.Router();
&nbsp;
	// liste des routes
	public getRoutes = () =&gt; {
		// Créer une route en GET simple
		this.router.get("/", new ContactController().index);
		this.router.post("/", new ContactController().insert);
&nbsp;
		// variable de route: précédé par :; suivi du nom de la variable
		// appel 1
		// this.router.get("/:id", new ContactController().selectOne);
&nbsp;
		// retourner le routeur
		return this.router;
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default ContactRouter;
&nbsp;</pre></td></tr></table></pre>

import PackController from "../controller/pack_controller";
&nbsp;
class PackRouter {
	// router express
	private router = express.Router();
&nbsp;
	// liste des routes
	public getRoutes = () =&gt; {
		// Créer une route en GET simple
		this.router.get("/", new PackController().index);
&nbsp;
		// variable de route: précédé par :; suivi du nom de la variable
		// appel 1
		this.router.get("/:id", new PackController().selectOne);
&nbsp;
		// retourner le routeur
		return this.router;
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default PackRouter;
&nbsp;</pre></td></tr></table></pre>

<span class="cline-any cline-neutral">&nbsp;</span>
<span class="cline-any cline-neutral">&nbsp;</span></td><td class="text"><pre class="prettyprint lang-js">import express from "express";
import multer from "multer";
import ProductController from "../controller/product_controller";
import AuthorizationMiddleware from "../middleware/authorization_middleware";
&nbsp;
class ProductRouter {
	// router express
	private router = express.Router();
&nbsp;
	// multer permet de gérer le transfert de fichier
	// private multer = multer({ dest: "public" });
	// Si fichier ranger dans sous dossier, modifier le chemin
	private multer = multer({ dest: `${process.env.PUBLIC_DIR}/img/products` });
&nbsp;
	// liste des routes
	public getRoutes = () =&gt; {
		// Créer une route en GET simple
		this.router.get("/", new ProductController().index);
&nbsp;
		// variable de route: précédé par :; suivi du nom de la variable
		// appel 1
		this.router.get("/:id", new ProductController().selectOne);
&nbsp;
		// middleware multer
		// Creation: inserer un enregistrement =&gt; Post
		this.router.post(
			"/",
			this.multer.any(),
			new AuthorizationMiddleware().authorize(["admin"]),
			new ProductController().insert,
		);
		// Modification: mettre à jour un enregistrement =&gt; Put
		this.router.put(
			"/",
			this.multer.any(),
			new AuthorizationMiddleware().authorize(["admin"]),
			new ProductController().update,
		);
		// Supprimer =&gt; Delete
		this.router.delete(
			"/",
			new AuthorizationMiddleware().authorize(["admin"]),
			new ProductController().delete,
		);
&nbsp;
		// retourner le routeur
		return this.router;
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default ProductRouter;
&nbsp;</pre></td></tr></table></pre>

            </div><!-- /wrapper -->
            <div class='footer quiet pad2 space-top1 center small'>

</html>
    
```

	private router = express.Router();

	// liste des routes
	public getRoutes = () =&gt; {
		// Créer une route en GET simple
		this.router.post("/register", new SecurityController().register);
		this.router.post("/login", new SecurityController().login);
&nbsp;
		// retourner le routeur
		return this.router;
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default SecurityRouter;

		this.router.get("/", new SkinController().index);

		// appel 1
		this.router.get("/:id", new SkinController().selectOne);
&nbsp;
		// retourner le routeur
		return this.router;
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default SkinRouter;

&nbsp;
import fs from "node:fs/promises";
import { fileTypeFromFile } from "file-type";
&nbsp;
class FileService {
	// fonction qui renomme le fichier transferé en ajoutant l'extension
	// Cette fonction doit retourner le nom complet du fichier
	// C'est a nous de le faire pour des raisons de sécurité
	public rename = async (file: Express.Multer.File): Promise&lt;string&gt; =&gt; {
		// Ajouter l'extension au fichier
		const fullname = `${file.filename}.${(await fileTypeFromFile(file.path))?.ext}`;
		// console.log(fullname);
		// Renommer le fichier avec son nom complet
		await fs.rename(file.path, `${file.destination}/${fullname}`);
		// Retourner le nom complet
		return fullname;
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default FileService;
&nbsp;</pre></td></tr></table></pre>

&nbsp;
class MySQLService {
	// propriété statique : accessible sans objet
	// static: lorsque l'on appel l'objet, la propriéte ne change pas
	private static instance: PoolConnection;
&nbsp;
	// Créer fonction de connexion au server MySQL
	public connect = async () =&gt; {
		// si aucune connexion existe
		<span class="missing-if-branch" title="else path not taken" >E</span>if (!MySQLService.instance) {
			MySQLService.instance = await mysql
				.createPool({
					host: process.env.MYSQL_HOST,
					user: process.env.MYSQL_USER,
					password: process.env.MYSQL_PASSWORD,
					database: process.env.MYSQL_DATABASE,
					namedPlaceholders: true,
				})
				.getConnection();
		}
&nbsp;
		// Retourner la connexion
		return MySQLService.instance;
	};
}
&nbsp;
export default MySQLService;

### FICHIER : code/tests/coverage/sorter.js

```js
/* eslint-disable */
var addSorting = (function() {
    'use strict';
    var cols,
        currentSort = {
            index: 0,
            desc: false
        };

    // returns the summary table element
    function getTable() {
        return document.querySelector('.coverage-summary');
    }
    // returns the thead element of the summary table
    function getTableHeader() {
        return getTable().querySelector('thead tr');
    }
    // returns the tbody element of the summary table
    function getTableBody() {
        return getTable().querySelector('tbody');
    }
    // returns the th element for nth column
    function getNthColumn(n) {
        return getTableHeader().querySelectorAll('th')[n];
    }

    function onFilterInput() {
        const searchValue = document.getElementById('fileSearch').value;
        const rows = document.getElementsByTagName('tbody')[0].children;

        // Try to create a RegExp from the searchValue. If it fails (invalid regex),
        // it will be treated as a plain text search
        let searchRegex;
        try {
            searchRegex = new RegExp(searchValue, 'i'); // 'i' for case-insensitive
        } catch (error) {
            searchRegex = null;
        }

        for (let i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
            const row = rows[i];
            let isMatch = false;

            if (searchRegex) {
                // If a valid regex was created, use it for matching
                isMatch = searchRegex.test(row.textContent);
            } else {
                // Otherwise, fall back to the original plain text search
                isMatch = row.textContent
                    .toLowerCase()
                    .includes(searchValue.toLowerCase());
            }

            row.style.display = isMatch ? '' : 'none';
        }
    }

    // loads the search box
    function addSearchBox() {
        var template = document.getElementById('filterTemplate');
        var templateClone = template.content.cloneNode(true);
        templateClone.getElementById('fileSearch').oninput = onFilterInput;
        template.parentElement.appendChild(templateClone);
    }

    // loads all columns
    function loadColumns() {
        var colNodes = getTableHeader().querySelectorAll('th'),
            colNode,
            cols = [],
            col,
            i;

        for (i = 0; i < colNodes.length; i += 1) {
            colNode = colNodes[i];
            col = {
                key: colNode.getAttribute('data-col'),
                sortable: !colNode.getAttribute('data-nosort'),
                type: colNode.getAttribute('data-type') || 'string'
            };
            cols.push(col);
            if (col.sortable) {
                col.defaultDescSort = col.type === 'number';
                colNode.innerHTML =
                    colNode.innerHTML + '<span class="sorter"></span>';
            }
        }
        return cols;
    }
    // attaches a data attribute to every tr element with an object
    // of data values keyed by column name
    function loadRowData(tableRow) {
        var tableCols = tableRow.querySelectorAll('td'),
            colNode,
            col,
            data = {},
            i,
            val;
        for (i = 0; i < tableCols.length; i += 1) {
            colNode = tableCols[i];
            col = cols[i];
            val = colNode.getAttribute('data-value');
            if (col.type === 'number') {
                val = Number(val);
            }
            data[col.key] = val;
        }
        return data;
    }
    // loads all row data
    function loadData() {
        var rows = getTableBody().querySelectorAll('tr'),
            i;

        for (i = 0; i < rows.length; i += 1) {
            rows[i].data = loadRowData(rows[i]);
        }
    }
    // sorts the table using the data for the ith column
    function sortByIndex(index, desc) {
        var key = cols[index].key,
            sorter = function(a, b) {
                a = a.data[key];
                b = b.data[key];
                return a < b ? -1 : a > b ? 1 : 0;
            },
            finalSorter = sorter,
            tableBody = document.querySelector('.coverage-summary tbody'),
            rowNodes = tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr'),
            rows = [],
            i;

        if (desc) {
            finalSorter = function(a, b) {
                return -1 * sorter(a, b);
            };
        }

        for (i = 0; i < rowNodes.length; i += 1) {
            rows.push(rowNodes[i]);
            tableBody.removeChild(rowNodes[i]);
        }

        rows.sort(finalSorter);

        for (i = 0; i < rows.length; i += 1) {
            tableBody.appendChild(rows[i]);
        }
    }
    // removes sort indicators for current column being sorted
    function removeSortIndicators() {
        var col = getNthColumn(currentSort.index),
            cls = col.className;

        cls = cls.replace(/ sorted$/, '').replace(/ sorted-desc$/, '');
        col.className = cls;
    }
    // adds sort indicators for current column being sorted
    function addSortIndicators() {
        getNthColumn(currentSort.index).className += currentSort.desc
            ? ' sorted-desc'
            : ' sorted';
    }
    // adds event listeners for all sorter widgets
    function enableUI() {
        var i,
            el,
            ithSorter = function ithSorter(i) {
                var col = cols[i];

                return function() {
                    var desc = col.defaultDescSort;

                    if (currentSort.index === i) {
                        desc = !currentSort.desc;
                    }
                    sortByIndex(i, desc);
                    removeSortIndicators();
                    currentSort.index = i;
                    currentSort.desc = desc;
                    addSortIndicators();
                };
            };
        for (i = 0; i < cols.length; i += 1) {
            if (cols[i].sortable) {
                // add the click event handler on the th so users
                // dont have to click on those tiny arrows
                el = getNthColumn(i).querySelector('.sorter').parentElement;
                if (el.addEventListener) {
                    el.addEventListener('click', ithSorter(i));
                } else {
                    el.attachEvent('onclick', ithSorter(i));
                }
            }
        }
    }
    // adds sorting functionality to the UI
    return function() {
        if (!getTable()) {
            return;
        }
        cols = loadColumns();
        loadData();
        addSearchBox();
        addSortIndicators();
        enableUI();
    };
})();

window.addEventListener('load', addSorting);

```

### FICHIER : code/tests/server/controller/homepage_controller.test.ts

```ts
import supertest from "supertest";
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import Server from "../../../server/core/server";

// describe (from vitest), permet de regrouper plusieurs tests
describe("homepage controller test suites", () => {
	const apiRoute = "/api";
	const route = "/";
	// it: permet de créer un test
	// tester le code 200 renvoyer par la route
	it("it should returns a 200 status code", async () => {
		// arrange: organiser
		// expected est le resultat attendu (il doit etre connu a l'avance)
		const expected = 200;

		// test sut: System Under Test
		const sut = supertest(new Server().startServer());

		// act: agir sur le système que l'on test
		// actual: permet de définir l'obtention du resultat
		const response = await sut.get(`${apiRoute}${route}`);
		const actual = response.status;

		// console.log(response);

		// assert: affirmer le / assertion du resultat attendu
		expect(actual).toBe(expected);
	});
});

```

### FICHIER : code/tests/server/controller/product_controller.test.ts

```ts
import * as jose from "jose";
import supertest from "supertest";
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import type { Product } from "../../../models/product";
import type { User } from "../../../models/user";
import Server from "../../../server/core/server";

// describe (from vitest), permet de regrouper plusieurs tests
describe("product controller test suites", async () => {
	// Configuration du test
	const apiRoute = "/api";
	const route = "/product";

	// création admin pour test
	const admin: User = {
		id: 1,
		email: "admin@hammam.com",
		password:
			"$argon2i$v=19$m=16,t=2,p=1$UjdRQlAwR2FOSnY3eDZNWg$t7mHIlV7pYC64GrfIGq+Sg",
		role_id: 1,
		role: {
			id: 1,
			name: "admin",
		},
		skin_id: 3,
	};

	// création token JWT pour test
	const secret = new TextEncoder().encode(process.env.VITE_JWT_SECRET);
	const alg = "HS256";
	const token = await new jose.SignJWT(admin as User)
		.setProtectedHeader({ alg })
		// Durée de validité du token (10heures)
		.setExpirationTime("10h")
		.sign(secret);

	// création fake data pour test
	const data: Partial<Product> = {
		id: 1,
		name: `name -${Math.random()}`,
		image: "Baume_main_test.png",
		description: "Description produit baume main pour test ",
		price: 6.9,
		category_id: 1,
		skin_ids: "2",
		body_part_ids: "2",
		pack_ids: "1",
	};

	// it: permet de créer un test
	// tester le code 200 renvoyer par la route
	it("it should returns a 201 status code when a product is insert", async () => {
		// arrange: organiser
		// expected est le resultat attendu (il doit etre connu a l'avance)
		const expected = 201;

		// test sut: System Under Test
		const sut = supertest(new Server().startServer());

		// act: agir sur le système que l'on test
		/* 
            Envoyer des donnés dans body:
                - Si une image est présente 
                    => utiliser la methode field pour chaque champs
                    => utiliser la methode attach pour transformer un image
                - Si il n'y a pas d'image
                    => utiliser la methode send
        */
		// actual: permet de définir l'obtention du resultat
		const response = await sut
			.post(`${apiRoute}${route}`)
			// Ajout du token
			.auth(token, { type: "bearer" })
			.field("name", data.name as string)
			.field("description", data.description as string)
			.field("price", data.price as number)
			.field("category_id", data.category_id as number)
			.field("skin_ids", data.skin_ids as string)
			.field("body_part_ids", data.body_part_ids as string)
			.field("pack_ids", data.pack_ids as string)
			.attach("image", `${process.env.PUBLIC_DIR}/img/products/${data.image}`);

		// console.log(response);

		const actual = response.status;

		// console.log(response);

		// assert: affirmer le / assertion du resultat attendu (verifie la concordance)
		expect(actual).toBe(expected);
	});
});

```

```ts
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";

const sum = (n1: number, n2: number) => n1 + n2;

// describe (from vitest), permet de regrouper plusieurs tests
describe("sum test suites", () => {
	// it: permet de créer un test
	it("it should returns a sum of two numbers", () => {
		// arrange: organiser
		// expected est le resultat attendu (il doit etre connu a l'avance)
		const expected = 5;
		const notExpected = 4;
		const n1 = 2;
		const n2 = 3;

		// act: agir sure système que l'on test
		// actual: permet de définir l'obtention du resultat
		const actual = sum(n1, n2);

		// assert: affirmer le / assertion du resultat attendu
		expect(actual).toBe(expected);
		expect(actual).not.toBe(notExpected);
	});
});

```

---
### FICHIER : code/tsconfig.json

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "erasableSyntaxOnly": true,
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "moduleResolution": "Bundler",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "target": "ESNext",
    "lib": ["ESNext", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "types": ["vite/client", "@vitejs/plugin-rsc/types"],
    "jsx": "react-jsx"
  }
}

```

---
### FICHIER : code/vite.config.ts

```ts
import react from "@vitejs/plugin-react";
import rsc from "@vitejs/plugin-rsc";
import { defineConfig, loadEnv } from "vite";

export default defineConfig(({ mode }) => {
	// modifier l'hôte MySQL avec github actions
	if (process.env.GITHUB_ACTIONS) {
		process.env.MYSQL_HOST = "127.0.0.1";
	}

	return {
		server: {
			port: 5173,
			host: true,
		},
		test: {
			// Charer le fichier d'environnement de test
			env: loadEnv(mode, process.cwd(), ""),

			// Inclure/Exclure des dossier ou des fichier
			// ** précision pour les sous dossier
			coverage: {
				include: ["server/**/*.ts"],
				exclude: ["node_modules", "mongodb", "server/index.ts"],

				// dossier d'exportation de la couverture de code en version HTML
				reportsDirectory: "tests/coverage",
			},
		},

		plugins: [
			rsc({
				// `entries` option is only a shorthand for specifying each `rollupOptions.input` below
				// > entries: { rsc, ssr, client },
				//
				// by default, the plugin setup request handler based on `default export` of `rsc` environment `rollupOptions.input.index`.
				// This can be disabled when setting up own server handler e.g. `@cloudflare/vite-plugin`.
				// > serverHandler: false
			}),

			// use any of react plugins https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react
			// to enable client component HMR
			react(),

			// use https://github.com/antfu-collective/vite-plugin-inspect
			// to understand internal transforms required for RSC.
			// import("vite-plugin-inspect").then(m => m.default()),
		],

		// specify entry point for each environment.
		// (currently the plugin assumes `rollupOptions.input.index` for some features.)
		environments: {
			// `rsc` environment loads modules with `react-server` condition.
			// this environment is responsible for:
			// - RSC stream serialization (React VDOM -> RSC stream)
			// - server functions handling
			rsc: {
				build: {
					rollupOptions: {
						input: {
							index: "./src/framework/entry.rsc.tsx",
						},
					},
				},
			},

			// `ssr` environment loads modules without `react-server` condition.
			// this environment is responsible for:
			// - RSC stream deserialization (RSC stream -> React VDOM)
			// - traditional SSR (React VDOM -> HTML string/stream)
			ssr: {
				build: {
					rollupOptions: {
						input: {
							index: "./src/framework/entry.ssr.tsx",
						},
					},
				},
			},

			// client environment is used for hydration and client-side rendering
			// this environment is responsible for:
			// - RSC stream deserialization (RSC stream -> React VDOM)
			// - traditional CSR (React VDOM -> Browser DOM tree mount/hydration)
			// - refetch and re-render RSC
			// - calling server functions
			client: {
				build: {
					rollupOptions: {
						input: {
							index: "./src/framework/entry.browser.tsx",
						},
					},
				},
			},
		},
	};
});

```
